title: Proxmox VLAN 70 Migration
summary: Student validates Proxmox management or service migration to ARIA VLAN 70.
student_goal: Confirm the correct VLAN 70 addressing, gateway, bridge, and service reachability after migration.

required_evidence.label: VLAN 70 IP addressing
required_evidence.description: Student must document the expected and actual VLAN 70 IP configuration.

required_evidence.label: Gateway reachability
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm the system can reach the VLAN 70 gateway.

required_evidence.label: Service reachability
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm ARIA service access after migration.

opening_questions: What system or service was migrated to VLAN 70?
What IP address and gateway should it use?
Can it reach the VLAN 70 gateway and required services?
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not approve migration without gateway and service reachability evidence.
Ask for current IP and bridge evidence before troubleshooting.
Keep rollback considerations visible during network migration work.
